productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Nimrod Oxford Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a full button placket, a patch pocket on the left chest with appliquéd branding and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This shirt from wrangler is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette, making for an easy and comfortable addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp chinos and leather shoes or jeans and sports shoes paired with classy accessories. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
